items.title: ‘I found out too late’: My stepmother cheated me out of $500K from my father’s estate. What can I do?
items.description: “Within a week or two after the deadline to contest the will expired, my stepmother sent me an email stating she would not share anything.”

items.title: AI will lead to mass unemployment, a new paper says — but other researchers are skeptical
items.description: The Citrini Research paper imagines a scenario in which widespread AI adoption leads to disruption and societal chaos. Evercore called it “thought-pro...

items.title: AMD’s stock rockets as Meta deal serves as major validation point for investors
items.description: Meta, looking to diversify beyond Nvidia, bets big on AMD chips, with a chance to invest in the company.

items.title: Consumers are more upbeat about the U.S. economy than previously thought
items.description: Consumer spending has been the most important driver of economic growth over the past year.

items.title: My grandpa retired happily at 70 with $750K after working as a missionary. I know where most Americans go wrong.
items.description: “You could even retire at 55 with $500,000 and be perfectly fine. Am I right?”
